models.name: gpt5_4
models.notes: Flagship model for professional work with stronger reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows, including GPT-5.3-Codex coding capabilities

models.name: gpt5_3codex
models.notes: Industry-leading coding model for complex software engineering; its coding capabilities now also power GPT-5.4

models.name: gpt5_3codex_spark
models.notes: Text-only research preview model for near-instant coding iteration; available to ChatGPT Pro users

models.name: gpt5_2codex
models.notes: Advanced coding model for real-world engineering; succeeded by GPT-5.3-Codex

models.name: gpt5_1codex_mini
models.notes: Smaller, more cost-effective, less-capable version of GPT-5.1-Codex
